description_long: This is a robust wooden storage crate with a rectangular shape and reinforced metal corner brackets, giving it a sturdy and industrial appearance. The wood grain is clearly visible, with a natural brown finish and a slightly rough texture. On one side, there is a prominent white stencil graphic of a flexed muscular arm and the words 'ARMS DEALER' in a bold, distressed font, suggesting it may be used for transporting or storing heavy or valuable items. The top of the crate is flat and appears to be a removable lid, secured by the frame but without visible hinges or locks. The crate is solid and boxy, with no visible handles or openings aside from the lid. Its design is utilitarian, suitable for placement in garages, warehouses, or urban storage areas.
description: A sturdy wooden storage crate with metal corner reinforcements and a white 'ARMS DEALER' stencil graphic on one side. The box has a flat, removable lid and a rugged, industrial look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white 'ARMS DEALER' stencil and flexed arm graphic on the wood grain surface.
description_view_1: Side view nearly identical to the front, with the same graphic and wood texture visible.
description_view_2: Another side view, again displaying the same stencil and wood pattern, with no additional features.
description_view_3: Rear view, visually indistinguishable from the other sides, featuring the same graphic and construction.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: white stencil graphic with 'ARMS DEALER' and flexed arm
